economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations in FY2020. First Nation has investments in Webequie Machitawiin General Partner Inc., Cyr Drilling International Ltd. (6.67%), and Sovereign Wealth LP (0.8106%). Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership revenues and expenses consolidated. Ring of Fire area referenced via Ministry of Energy, Northern Development and Mines funding.
notes: DISCLAIMER OF OPINION issued by MNP LLP — audit scope was limited due to lack of supporting documentation for assets, liabilities, revenue and expenses. This is a qualified/disclaimed audit, not a clean opinion. audit_qualified set to true. ISC revenue on statement is $16,143,108 but Note 15 states ISC contribution received was $11,804,693 with deferred revenue accounting; $16,143,108 used as reported revenue figure. FNIH funding of $4,338,415 is included within ISC revenue in current year (not shown separately). Fiscal year 2020 — audit report dated March 18, 2023, nearly 3 years after year-end. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act noted. Capital lease obligations of $57,846 excluded from long_term_debt figure shown ($5,789,952 is term debt only). Annual debt service reflects term loan repayments only ($1,477,643); capital lease repayments were an additional $117,663. Net debt of $5,647,854 reported as negative net financial assets.
